feature.name: accidental
feature.notes: api::Accidental via accidentalMap; all members mapped except AccidentalValue::other (no api::Accidental::other member).

feature.name: accidental-mark
feature.notes: api::MarkType accidentalMark*; all members mapped except AccidentalValue::other (no api::MarkType::accidentalMarkOther member).

feature.name: articulations
feature.notes: All articulation marks -> api::MarkType (MarkData) via articulationsMap; enum complete (softAccent now mapped).

feature.name: backup
feature.notes: Timing only; consumed by MeasureReader cursor (no field, governs tick position).

feature.name: bar-style
feature.notes: BarlineType via barlineMap (tick/short -> unsupported by design).

feature.name: bend
feature.notes: No MarkType member; carries bend-alter/pre-bend/release (see technical enum).

feature.name: creator
feature.notes: Only type=composer/lyricist/arranger/publisher recognized; other types dropped. ScoreReader.cpp:179-209, ScoreWriter.cpp:86-114.

feature.name: credit
feature.notes: Credits with credit-words round-trip via PageTextData; credit-image not modeled; credit with no credit-words dropped (PageTextFunctions.cpp:53-61).

feature.name: credit-type
feature.notes: Flattened to PageTextData.description; only the first credit-type kept (PageTextFunctions.cpp:76-78).

feature.name: divisions
feature.notes: Drives tick math; MeasureReader (not surfaced as a field, but governs timing).

feature.name: dynamics
feature.notes: Dynamics -> api::MarkType (DynamicsReader/Writer); dynamicsMap complete including n/pf/sfzp.

feature.name: f
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.f via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: fermata
feature.notes: api::MarkType fermata*; fermataMap complete (all shapes including 4.0 doubleAngled/curlew).

feature.name: ff
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.ff via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: fff
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.fff via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: ffff
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.ffff via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: fffff
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.fffff via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: ffffff
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.ffffff via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: figure
feature.notes: Flattened to text; not separately modeled.

feature.name: figured-bass
feature.notes: Read as plain text into a WordsData direction (MeasureReader.parseFiguredBass cpp:580); NOT written back as figured-bass -> lost on round-trip.

feature.name: fingering
feature.notes: No MarkType member; carries text (see technical enum).

feature.name: forward
feature.notes: Timing only; consumed by MeasureReader cursor.

feature.name: fp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.fp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: fz
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.fz via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: hammer-on
feature.notes: No MarkType member; carries text/start-stop (see technical enum).

feature.name: identification
feature.notes: creator/rights/encoding/miscellaneous mapped; source & relation dropped. ScoreReader.cpp:179-240.

feature.name: instrument-sound
feature.notes: InstrumentData.soundID via instrumentMap; all SoundID values mapped.

feature.name: inversion
feature.notes: Harmony <inversion> not modeled (core::Inversion exists, unreferenced in impl).

feature.name: measure
feature.notes: api::MeasureData; MeasureReader/MeasureWriter. Attrs: number, width, implicit.

feature.name: mf
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.mf via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: mp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.mp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: music-font
feature.notes: Defaults <music-font> not modeled; dropped on read/write.

feature.name: n
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.n via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: notehead
feature.notes: api::Notehead via noteheadMap; enum complete (all NoteheadValue members mapped). Partial: filled/parentheses attribute support limited.

feature.name: ornaments
feature.notes: All ornaments -> api::MarkType via ornamentsMap; enum complete (all OrnamentsGroupChoice::Kind members mapped).

feature.name: other-dynamics
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.otherDynamics via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: p
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.p via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: part-group
feature.notes: api::PartGroupData via ScoreReader::startPartGroup/ScoreWriter::makePartGroupStart. Round-trips type, number, group-name, group-abbreviation, group-symbol (->bracketType), group-barline (->api::GroupBarline), and group-name-display/group-abbreviation-display as best-effort plain text (->displayName/displayAbbreviation). Partial because group-time and editorial (footnote/level) are not modeled, and formatting attributes on group-name/group-symbol/group-barline/display names (color, default-x, font-*, etc.) are dropped (value only). A part-group start with no matching stop is dropped by design: api::PartGroupData models a complete start..stop span, and an unmatched start is semantically invalid (a constraint beyond XSD).

feature.name: part-symbol
feature.notes: Value, top-staff, bottom-staff round-tripped via PartSymbolData.

feature.name: percussion
feature.notes: direction-type percussion (and all stick/beater/glass/metal/wood/membrane/timpani children) not modeled.

feature.name: pf
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.pf via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: pluck
feature.notes: No MarkType member; carries text (see technical enum).

feature.name: pp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.pp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: ppp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.ppp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: pppp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.pppp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: ppppp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.ppppp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: pppppp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.pppppp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: print
feature.notes: Layout written from api per measure (MeasureWriter); per-measure read is a stub (MeasureReader parsePrint no-op); system/page info recovered at score level (ScoreReader scanForSystemInfo/scanForPageInfo). new-system/new-page handled; many print attributes lost on read.

feature.name: pull-off
feature.notes: No MarkType member; carries text/start-stop (see technical enum).

feature.name: rf
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.rf via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: rfz
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.rfz via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: rights
feature.notes: Mapped to ScoreData.copyright; only copyright-type kept, others dropped. ScoreReader.cpp:211-225.

feature.name: score-timewise
feature.notes: mx reads/writes partwise only; timewise score not modeled.

feature.name: sf
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.sf via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: sffz
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.sffz via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: sfp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.sfp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: sfpp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.sfpp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: sfz
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.sfz via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: sfzp
feature.notes: Child element of <dynamics>; maps to MarkType.sfzp via dynamicsMap.

feature.name: software
feature.notes: EncodingData.software; EncodingFunctions.cpp (mx marker dropped on read).

feature.name: sound
feature.notes: <sound> element dropped entirely; MeasureReader.parseSound is a no-op stub (MeasureReader.cpp:618); DirectionData has a 'TODO - sound element' (DirectionData.h:96).

feature.name: source
feature.notes: No api representation; not read or written.

feature.name: staff
feature.notes: Staff index on notes/directions; pervasive in MeasureReader/Writer.

feature.name: staff-layout
feature.notes: Only staff-distance exposed (SystemLayoutData.staffDistance); per-staff index not modeled. LayoutFunctions.cpp:344-346.

feature.name: tap
feature.notes: No MarkType member; carries text (see technical enum).

feature.name: technical
feature.notes: Technical marks -> api::MarkType via technicalMarkMap; most members mapped including brassBend/flip/smear/open/halfMuted/harmonMute/golpe/fingering/pluck. hammerOn/pullOff carry start-stop+text (complex); tap carries text; all three are commented-out in technicalMarkMap. bend is its own unsupported element.

feature.name: tremolo
feature.notes: Single-note tremolo -> MarkType.tremoloSingle*; multi-note tremolo spanner limited.

feature.name: virtual-instrument
feature.notes: Container for virtual-name/library; not a standalone field.

feature.name: wedge
feature.notes: api::WedgeStart/WedgeStop; DirectionReader.parseWedge (stop/continue routed structurally, not via WedgeType enum).
